packageRules.description: Auto-merge patch and minor updates after a 7-day soak; major updates stay manual. platformAutomerge uses GitHub's native auto-merge, so each PR merges only once the required branch-protection checks pass and only Renovate's own PRs are affected. automergeStrategy is pinned to 'merge' because the main ruleset only permits merge commits; GitHub rejects arming auto-merge if Renovate requests a disallowed strategy.
